creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
* Update mail/postfix and mail/postfix2? to latest version.
	  ** Repo-copy mail/postfix to mail/postfix29, and update
	     the former to 2.10.0.
	  ** Update mail/postfix2[6789] to their latest versions.
	  ** Update CONFLICTS.
	  ** Since 2.6.x is no longer supported by upstream, mark
	     mail/postfix26 as DEPRECATED and set EXPIRATION_DATE.
	* Add lincense information.
	* Update "Created by" header of Makefile.
	* Pet portlint.
	  ** Remove shlib version of LIB_DEPENDS.
	  ** Fix WWW line of pkg-descr.

Fix: Attached patch should be applied with following commands:

	% cd /usr/ports
	% svn copy mail/postfix mail/postfix29
	% svn patch /somewhere/saved/dir/patch-postfix
